contents:
[package]
name = "fontique"
version = "0.7.0"
description = "Font enumeration and fallback."
keywords = ["font", "text"]
categories = ["gui", "os"]
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.83"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/linebender/parley"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true

[lints.rust]
unsafe_code = "deny"
keyword_idents_2024 = "forbid"
non_ascii_idents = "forbid"
non_local_definitions = "forbid"
unsafe_op_in_unsafe_fn = "forbid"
elided_lifetimes_in_paths = "warn"
missing_debug_implementations = "warn"
missing_docs = "warn"
trivial_numeric_casts = "warn"
unnameable_types = "warn"
unreachable_pub = "warn"
unused_import_braces = "warn"
unused_lifetimes = "warn"
unused_macro_rules = "warn"
unused_qualifications = "warn"

[lints.clippy]
too_many_arguments = "allow"
allow_attributes_without_reason = "warn"
cast_possible_truncation = "warn"
collection_is_never_read = "warn"
default_trait_access = "warn"
dbg_macro = "warn"
debug_assert_with_mut_call = "warn"
doc_markdown = "warn"
fn_to_numeric_cast_any = "warn"
infinite_loop = "warn"
large_stack_arrays = "warn"
mismatching_type_param_order = "warn"
missing_assert_message = "warn"
missing_fields_in_debug = "warn"
same_functions_in_if_condition = "warn"
semicolon_if_nothing_returned = "warn"
should_panic_without_expect = "warn"
todo = "warn"
unseparated_literal_suffix = "warn"
use_self = "warn"
cargo_common_metadata = "warn"
negative_feature_names = "warn"
redundant_feature_names = "warn"
wildcard_dependencies = "warn"

[features]
default = ["system"]
std = ["read-fonts/std", "dep:memmap2"]
libm = ["read-fonts/libm", "dep:core_maths"]
icu_properties = ["dep:icu_properties"]
unicode_script = ["dep:unicode-script"]
system = ["std", "dep:windows", "dep:windows-core", "dep:objc2", "dep:objc2-core-foundation", "dep:objc2-core-text", "dep:objc2-foundation", "dep:yeslogic-fontconfig-sys", "dep:roxmltree"]
fontconfig-dlopen = ["yeslogic-fontconfig-sys?/dlopen"]

[dependencies]
smallvec = "1.15.1"
hashbrown = "0.16.1"

[dependencies.bytemuck]
version = "1.24.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.read-fonts]
version = "0.35.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.linebender_resource_handle]
version = "0.1.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.memmap2]
version = "0.9.9"
optional = true

[dependencies.unicode-script]
version = "0.5.7"
optional = true

[dependencies.core_maths]
version = "0.1.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.icu_properties]
features = ["compiled_data"]
optional = true
version = "2.1.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.icu_locale_core]
features = ["alloc"]
version = "2.1.1"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows]
version = "0.58.0"
features = ["implement", "Win32_Graphics_DirectWrite"]
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows-core]
version = "0.58.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2]
version = "0.6.3"
optional = true
features = ["std", "relax-sign-encoding"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3.2"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["alloc", "NSArray", "NSEnumerator", "NSPathUtilities", "NSString"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-foundation]
version = "0.3.2"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["CFBase"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-text]
version = "0.3.2"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["CTFont", "CTFontDescriptor"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.yeslogic-fontconfig-sys]
version = "6.0.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.roxmltree]
version = "0.21.1"
optional = true

[package]
name = "mdns-sd"
version = "0.10.4"
authors = ["keepsimple <keepsimple@gmail.com>"]
edition = "2018"
rust-version = "1.61.0"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/keepsimple1/mdns-sd"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/mdns-sd"
keywords = ["mdns", "discovery", "service-discovery", "zeroconf", "dns-sd"]
categories = ["network-programming"]
description = "mDNS Service Discovery library with no async runtime dependency"

[features]
async = ["flume/async"]
logging = ["log"]
default = ["async", "logging"]

[dependencies]
polling = "2.1"

[dependencies.flume]
version = "0.11"
default-features = false

[dependencies.if-addrs]
version = "0.10"
features = ["link-local"]

[dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.socket2]
version = "0.4"
features = ["all"]

[dev-dependencies]
fastrand = "1.8"

[package]
name = "nearby-rs"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.74"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "A faithful, test-first Rust port of Google's Nearby Connections protocol (wire format + bandwidth-upgrade subsystem)."
repository = "https://github.com/joeleaver/nearby-rs"
readme = "README.md"
keywords = ["nearby", "quick-share", "protocol", "p2p"]
categories = ["network-programming", "encoding"]
exclude = [".github/"]

[features]
tokio = ["dep:tokio"]

[dependencies]
prost = "0.13"

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["rt", "sync", "time", "macros"]
optional = true

[dev-dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["rt", "sync", "time", "macros", "test-util"]

[build-dependencies]
prost-build = "0.13"

[package]
name = "parley"
version = "0.7.0"
description = "Parley provides an API for implementing rich text layout."
keywords = ["text", "layout"]
categories = ["gui", "graphics"]
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.83"
license = "Apache-2.0 OR MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/linebender/parley"
exclude = ["/tests"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true

[lints.rust]
unsafe_code = "deny"
keyword_idents_2024 = "forbid"
non_ascii_idents = "forbid"
non_local_definitions = "forbid"
unsafe_op_in_unsafe_fn = "forbid"
elided_lifetimes_in_paths = "warn"
missing_debug_implementations = "warn"
missing_docs = "warn"
trivial_numeric_casts = "warn"
unnameable_types = "warn"
unreachable_pub = "warn"
unused_import_braces = "warn"
unused_lifetimes = "warn"
unused_macro_rules = "warn"
unused_qualifications = "warn"

[lints.clippy]
too_many_arguments = "allow"
allow_attributes_without_reason = "warn"
cast_possible_truncation = "warn"
collection_is_never_read = "warn"
default_trait_access = "warn"
dbg_macro = "warn"
debug_assert_with_mut_call = "warn"
doc_markdown = "warn"
fn_to_numeric_cast_any = "warn"
infinite_loop = "warn"
large_stack_arrays = "warn"
mismatching_type_param_order = "warn"
missing_assert_message = "warn"
missing_fields_in_debug = "warn"
same_functions_in_if_condition = "warn"
semicolon_if_nothing_returned = "warn"
should_panic_without_expect = "warn"
todo = "warn"
unseparated_literal_suffix = "warn"
use_self = "warn"
cargo_common_metadata = "warn"
negative_feature_names = "warn"
redundant_feature_names = "warn"
wildcard_dependencies = "warn"

[features]
default = ["system"]
std = ["fontique/std", "harfrust/std", "peniko/std", "skrifa/std", "swash/std"]
libm = ["fontique/libm", "peniko/libm", "skrifa/libm", "swash/libm", "dep:core_maths"]
system = ["std", "fontique/system"]
accesskit = ["dep:accesskit"]

[dependencies]
hashbrown = "0.16.1"

[dependencies.swash]
version = "0.2.6"
default-features = false

[dependencies.skrifa]
version = "0.37.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.linebender_resource_handle]
version = "0.1.1"
default-features = false

[dependencies.fontique]
version = "0.7.0"
default-features = false
path = "fontique"

[dependencies.core_maths]
version = "0.1.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.accesskit]
optional = true
version = "0.21.1"

[dependencies.harfrust]
version = "0.3.2"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies]
tiny-skia = "0.11.4"

[dev-dependencies.parley_dev]
default-features = false
path = "parley_dev"

[dev-dependencies.peniko]
version = "0.4.1"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"android\"))".dev-dependencies.oxipng]
version = "9.1.5"
default-features = false
features = ["freestanding"]

[package]
name = "rinch"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "A lightweight cross-platform GUI library for Rust"

[dependencies]
tracing = "0.1"

[dependencies.rinch-core]
path = "crates/rinch-core"

[dependencies.rinch-macros]
path = "crates/rinch-macros"

[dependencies.rinch-platform]
path = "crates/rinch-platform"

[dependencies.rinch-dom]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-dom"

[dependencies.rinch-editable]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-editable"

[dependencies.parley]
optional = true
git = "https://github.com/linebender/parley"
rev = "f6a8485c35367b581b03bd6da55c8465f24e16ef"

[dependencies.peniko]
version = "0.6"
optional = true

[dependencies.vello]
version = "0.7"
optional = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.bytemuck]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]
optional = true

[dependencies.rinch-renderer]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-renderer"

[dependencies.anyrender]
optional = true
version = "0.7"

[dependencies.anyrender_vello]
optional = true
version = "0.7"

[dependencies.wgpu]
optional = true
version = "27"

[dependencies.winit]
optional = true
version = "0.31.0-beta.2"

[dependencies.muda]
optional = true
version = "0.15"

[dependencies.tokio]
optional = true
version = "1"
features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros"]

[dependencies.pollster]
version = "0.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.futures-util]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
optional = true
version = "0.3"
features = ["env-filter"]

[dependencies.png]
version = "0.17"
optional = true

[dependencies.base64]
version = "0.22"
optional = true

[dependencies.keyboard-types]
version = "0.7"
optional = true

[dependencies.rfd]
optional = true
version = "0.15"

[dependencies.rinch-clipboard]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-clipboard"

[dependencies.tray-icon]
optional = true
version = "0.19"

[dependencies.rinch-theme]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-theme"

[dependencies.rinch-components]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-components"

[dependencies.rinch-debug]
path = "../rinch-debug"
optional = true

[dependencies.rinch-editor]
path = "crates/rinch-editor"

[dependencies.rinch-web]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-web"

[dependencies.rinch-video]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-video"

[dependencies.ureq]
version = "3"
optional = true

[dependencies.memory-stats]
version = "1.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.softbuffer]
git = "https://github.com/rust-windowing/softbuffer"
rev = "672d180"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.gtk]
version = "0.18"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.ksni]
optional = true
version = "0.3"
default-features = false
features = ["blocking", "tokio"]

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
js-sys = "0.3"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.web-sys]
version = "0.3"
features = ["Window", "Document", "Element", "HtmlCanvasElement", "CanvasRenderingContext2d", "ImageData", "MouseEvent", "WheelEvent", "EventTarget", "AddEventListenerOptions", "ResizeObserver", "ResizeObserverEntry", "ResizeObserverSize", "DomRectReadOnly"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows-sys]
version = "0.59"
features = ["Win32_Graphics_Gdi", "Win32_Foundation"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.android-activity]
version = "0.6"
features = ["native-activity"]
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.ndk]
version = "0.9"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.raw-window-handle]
version = "0.6"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.log]
version = "0.4"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.android_logger]
version = "0.14"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.rinch-android]
optional = true
path = "crates/rinch-android"

[features]
default = ["desktop"]
desktop = ["dep:rinch-dom", "dep:rinch-editable", "dep:parley", "dep:peniko", "dep:serde_json", "dep:winit", "dep:muda", "dep:tracing-subscriber", "dep:png", "dep:base64", "dep:keyboard-types", "dep:bytemuck", "dep:softbuffer", "rinch-dom/software-renderer"]
android = ["dep:rinch-dom", "dep:rinch-editable", "dep:parley", "dep:peniko", "dep:serde_json", "dep:tracing-subscriber", "dep:png", "dep:base64", "dep:keyboard-types", "dep:bytemuck", "dep:softbuffer", "rinch-dom/software-renderer", "dep:android-activity", "dep:ndk", "dep:raw-window-handle", "dep:log", "dep:android_logger", "dep:rinch-android"]
gpu = ["desktop", "dep:vello", "dep:wgpu", "dep:rinch-renderer", "dep:anyrender", "dep:anyrender_vello", "dep:tokio", "dep:pollster", "dep:futures-util"]
file-dialogs = ["rfd"]
clipboard = ["dep:rinch-clipboard"]
system-tray = ["tray-icon", "gtk", "ksni"]
memory-profile = ["memory-stats"]
theme = ["dep:rinch-theme", "rinch-core/theme"]
components = ["theme", "dep:rinch-components"]
debug = ["dep:rinch-debug"]
web = ["dep:rinch-web"]
video = ["dep:rinch-video"]
image-network = ["dep:ureq"]
collaboration = ["rinch-editor/collaboration"]

[package]
name = "rinch-android"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
log = "0.4"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies]
ndk-context = "0.1"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.jni]
version = "0.21"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.android-activity]
version = "0.6"
features = ["native-activity"]

[package]
name = "rinch-clipboard"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
description = "Cross-platform clipboard abstraction for rinch (native + WASM)"

[dependencies]

[target."cfg(all(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"), not(target_os = \"android\")))".dependencies]
arboard = "3"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.rinch-android]
path = "crates/rinch-android"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies]
wasm-bindgen = "0.2"
wasm-bindgen-futures = "0.4"
js-sys = "0.3"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.web-sys]
version = "0.3"
features = ["Window", "Navigator", "Clipboard", "ClipboardEvent"]

[package]
name = "rinch-components"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "UI component library for the rinch GUI framework - Mantine-inspired components"

[dependencies.rinch-core]
path = "crates/rinch-core"

[dependencies.rinch-theme]
path = "crates/rinch-theme"

[dependencies.rinch-macros]
path = "crates/rinch-macros"

[dependencies.rinch-tabler-icons]
path = "crates/rinch-tabler-icons"

[package]
name = "rinch-core"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Core types and traits for the rinch GUI framework"

[features]
default = []
theme = []

[dependencies]
thiserror = "1"
tracing = "0.1"

[package]
name = "rinch-debug"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Debug IPC server for rinch applications"

[dependencies]
serde_json = "1"
tracing = "0.1"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[package]
name = "rinch-dom"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"

[dependencies]
slab = "0.4"
taffy = "0.9"
bitflags = "2"
tracing = "0.1"
vello = "0.7"
peniko = "0.6"
serde_json = "1"
atomic_refcell = "0.1"
euclid = "0.22"
app_units = "0.7"
url = "2"
read-fonts = "0.37"
base64 = "0.22"
stylo = "0.11"
stylo_traits = "0.11"
stylo_dom = "0.11"
stylo_atoms = "0.11"
stylo_config = "0.11"
servo_arc = "0.4"
cssparser = "0.36"
selectors = "0.35"
precomputed-hash = "0.1"
web_atoms = "0.2"

[dependencies.rinch-core]
path = "crates/rinch-core"

[dependencies.parley]
git = "https://github.com/linebender/parley"
rev = "f6a8485c35367b581b03bd6da55c8465f24e16ef"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.image]
version = "0.25"
default-features = false
features = ["png", "jpeg", "gif", "webp"]

[dependencies.stylo_taffy]
path = "crates/stylo-taffy"

[dependencies.tiny-skia]
version = "0.11"
optional = true

[dependencies.swash]
version = "0.2"
optional = true

[features]
default = ["software-renderer"]
software-renderer = ["tiny-skia", "swash"]

[dev-dependencies]

[package]
name = "rinch-editable"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
description = "Generic text editing primitives for rinch"

[dependencies]

[package]
name = "rinch-editor"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Rich-text editor for Rinch with CRDT collaboration support"

[dependencies]
automerge = "0.5"
regex = "1"
thiserror = "1"
tracing = "0.1"
pulldown-cmark = "0.12"

[dependencies.rinch-core]
path = "crates/rinch-core"

[dependencies.rinch-editable]
path = "../rinch-editable"

[dependencies.rinch-editor-macros]
path = "../rinch-editor-macros"

[dependencies.rinch-clipboard]
path = "crates/rinch-clipboard"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.uuid]
version = "1"
features = ["js"]

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.2"
features = ["js"]

[dev-dependencies]
pretty_assertions = "1"
proptest = "1"

[features]
default = ["starter-kit"]
starter-kit = []
tables = []
task-lists = []
text-align = []
highlight = []
color = []
collaboration = []
all = ["starter-kit", "tables", "task-lists", "text-align", "highlight", "color", "collaboration"]

[package]
name = "rinch-editor-macros"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Procedural macros for Rinch editor extensions"

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1"
quote = "1"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2"
features = ["full"]

[package]
name = "rinch-macros"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Procedural macros for rinch - RSX syntax"

[lib]
proc-macro = true

[dependencies]
proc-macro2 = "1"
quote = "1"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2"
features = ["full", "parsing", "extra-traits", "visit"]

[dev-dependencies.rinch]
path = "../rinch"
features = ["components", "theme"]

[package]
name = "rinch-platform"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Platform abstraction traits for rinch"

[dependencies]
vello = "0.7"
peniko = "0.6"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies]
web-time = "1"

[package]
name = "rinch-tabler-icons"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
repository = "https://github.com/user/rinch"
description = "Tabler Icons for Rinch - 5000+ free SVG icons"
readme = "README.md"

[dependencies.rinch-core]
path = "crates/rinch-core"

[dependencies.rinch-macros]
path = "crates/rinch-macros"

[build-dependencies]
ureq = "3"
serde_json = "1"
heck = "0.5"

[package]
name = "rinch-theme"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Theme system for the rinch GUI framework"

[dependencies]

[package]
name = "rqs_lib"
version = "0.11.5"
edition = "2021"
authors = ["martichou"]

[[bin]]
name = "core_bin"
path = "src/bin.rs"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.bluer]
version = "0.17"
features = ["full"]
optional = true

[target."cfg(all(target_arch = \"aarch64\", target_os = \"linux\"))".dependencies.dbus]
version = "0.9"
features = ["vendored"]

[dependencies]
anyhow = "1.0"
base64 = "0.22"
bytes = "1.10"
directories = "6.0"
futures = "0.3"
get_if_addrs = "0.5"
hex = "0.4"
hkdf = "0.12"
hmac = "0.12"
libaes = "0.7"
log = "0.4"
mime_guess = "2.0"
num-bigint = "0.4"
once_cell = "1.20"
prost = "0.13"
rand = "0.9"
sha2 = "0.10"
uuid = "1.15"

[dependencies.btleplug]
version = "0.11"
optional = true

[dependencies.mdns-sd]
git = "https://github.com/Martichou/mdns-sd"
branch = "unsolicited"

[dependencies.nearby-rs]
git = "https://github.com/joeleaver/nearby-rs"
branch = "master"
features = ["tokio"]

[dependencies.p256]
version = "0.13"
features = ["ecdh"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.sys_metrics]
git = "https://github.com/Martichou/sys_metrics"

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.43"
features = ["macros", "rt", "rt-multi-thread", "net", "sync", "time", "io-util", "signal"]

[dependencies.tokio-util]
version = "0.7"
features = ["rt"]

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3"
features = ["env-filter"]

[dependencies.ts-rs]
version = "10.0"
features = ["serde-compat", "uuid-impl", "chrono-impl"]

[build-dependencies]
prost-build = "0.13"

[features]
default = ["experimental"]
experimental = ["bluer", "btleplug"]
linux-softap = []

[profile.release]
lto = true
opt-level = 3
codegen-units = 1

[workspace]
members = ["run-wasm"]

[package]
name = "softbuffer"
version = "0.4.8"
edition = "2021"
description = "Cross-platform buffer for software rendering"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/softbuffer"
repository = "https://github.com/rust-windowing/softbuffer"
rust-version = "1.71.0"
keywords = ["framebuffer", "windowing"]
categories = ["game-development", "graphics", "gui", "multimedia", "rendering"]
exclude = ["examples"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]
default-target = "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"
targets = ["x86_64-pc-windows-msvc", "x86_64-apple-darwin", "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu", "wasm32-unknown-unknown"]

[features]
default = ["wayland", "wayland-dlopen", "x11", "x11-dlopen"]
wayland = ["dep:wayland-backend", "dep:wayland-client", "dep:wayland-sys", "dep:memmap2", "dep:rustix", "dep:fastrand", "winit/wayland", "winit/wayland-csd-adwaita"]
wayland-dlopen = ["wayland-sys/dlopen", "winit/wayland-dlopen"]
x11 = ["dep:as-raw-xcb-connection", "dep:fastrand", "dep:rustix", "dep:tiny-xlib", "dep:x11rb", "winit/x11"]
x11-dlopen = ["tiny-xlib/dlopen", "x11rb/dl-libxcb"]
kms = ["dep:drm", "dep:rustix"]

[dependencies.raw-window-handle]
version = "0.6"
features = ["std"]

[dependencies.tracing]
version = "0.1.41"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies]
ndk = "0.9.0"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dev-dependencies]
android-activity = "0.6"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dev-dependencies.winit]
version = "0.30.0"
features = ["android-native-activity"]

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.fastrand]
version = "2.0.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.rustix]
version = "1.0.1"
default-features = false
optional = true
features = ["fs", "mm", "shm", "std"]

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.memmap2]
version = "0.9.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.wayland-backend]
version = "0.3.0"
optional = true
features = ["client_system"]

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.wayland-client]
version = "0.31.12"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.wayland-sys]
version = "0.31.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.as-raw-xcb-connection]
version = "1.0.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.tiny-xlib]
version = "0.2.1"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.x11rb]
version = "0.13.0"
optional = true
features = ["allow-unsafe-code", "shm"]

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dependencies.drm]
version = "0.14.1"
default-features = false
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(any(target_os = \"android\", target_vendor = \"apple\", target_os = \"redox\", target_family = \"wasm\", target_os = \"windows\")))".dev-dependencies.rustix]
version = "1.0.1"
features = ["event"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"windows\")".dependencies.windows-sys]
version = "0.61.2"
features = ["Win32_Graphics_Gdi", "Win32_UI_ColorSystem", "Win32_UI_Shell", "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging", "Win32_Foundation"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies]
objc2 = "0.6.0"

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-graphics]
version = "0.3.2"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "objc2", "CGColorSpace", "CGDataProvider", "CGImage"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-core-foundation]
version = "0.3.2"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "CFCGTypes"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-foundation]
version = "0.3.2"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "objc2-core-foundation", "NSDictionary", "NSGeometry", "NSKeyValueObserving", "NSString", "NSThread", "NSValue"]

[target."cfg(target_vendor = \"apple\")".dependencies.objc2-quartz-core]
version = "0.3.2"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "objc2-core-foundation", "CALayer", "CATransaction"]

[target."cfg(target_family = \"wasm\")".dependencies]
js-sys = "0.3.63"
wasm-bindgen = "0.2.86"

[target."cfg(target_family = \"wasm\")".dependencies.web-sys]
version = "0.3.55"
features = ["CanvasRenderingContext2d", "Document", "Element", "HtmlCanvasElement", "ImageData", "OffscreenCanvas", "OffscreenCanvasRenderingContext2d", "Window"]

[target."cfg(target_family = \"wasm\")".dev-dependencies]
wasm-bindgen-test = "0.3"
console_error_panic_hook = "0.1"
tracing-web = "0.1"

[target."cfg(target_family = \"wasm\")".dev-dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.4.1"
features = ["wasm_js"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"redox\")".dependencies]
redox_syscall = "0.7"

[target."cfg(not(target_family = \"wasm\"))".dev-dependencies]
rayon = "1.5.1"

[target."cfg(not(target_family = \"wasm\"))".dev-dependencies.criterion]
version = "0.8.1"
default-features = false
features = ["cargo_bench_support"]

[[example]]
name = "winit_android"
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[[example]]
name = "winit_multithread_android"
crate-type = ["cdylib"]

[[bench]]
name = "buffer"
harness = false

[dev-dependencies]
colorous = "1.0.12"
web-time = "1.0.0"
glam = "0.32.0"
rand = "0.10.0"

[dev-dependencies.winit]
version = "0.30.0"
default-features = false
features = ["rwh_06"]

[dev-dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3.18"
features = ["env-filter"]

[dev-dependencies.image]
version = "0.25.0"
default-features = false
features = ["jpeg"]

[package]
name = "stylo_taffy"
version = "0.2.0"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0 OR MPL-2.0"
description = "Interop crate for the stylo and taffy crates"
keywords = ["css", "layout"]
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
taffy = "0.9"
stylo = "0.11"
stylo_atoms = "0.11"

[features]
default = ["std", "block", "flexbox", "grid"]
std = ["taffy/std"]
block = ["taffy/block_layout"]
flexbox = ["taffy/flexbox"]
grid = ["taffy/grid"]

[package]
name = "sys_metrics"
version = "0.2.7"
authors = ["Martichou <martichou.andre@gmail.com>"]
edition = "2018"
documentation = "https://docs.rs/sys_metrics"
repository = "https://github.com/Martichou/sys_metrics"
description = "Cross-platform library to gather stats/information from the host"
keywords = ["metrics", "sysinfo", "psutil", "stats", "heim"]
license = "AGPL-3.0"
readme = "README.md"
categories = ["os", "api-bindings"]

[dependencies]
lazy_static = "1.4"
libc = "0.2"
glob = "0.3"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0"
features = ["derive"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"macos\")".dependencies]
core-foundation-sys = "0.8"
io-kit-sys = "0.3"
mach = "0.3"

[dev-dependencies]
criterion = "0.4"

[profile.release]
lto = true
opt-level = 3
codegen-units = 1

[lib]
bench = false

[[bench]]
name = "cpu_bench"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "disks_bench"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "memory_bench"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "host_bench"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "network_bench"
harness = false

[[bench]]
name = "virt_bench"
harness = false

[source.vendored-sources]
directory = "cargo/vendor"

[source.crates-io]
replace-with = "vendored-sources"

[source."https://github.com/linebender/parley"]
git = "https://github.com/linebender/parley"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
rev = "f6a8485c35367b581b03bd6da55c8465f24e16ef"

[source."https://github.com/martichou/mdns-sd"]
git = "https://github.com/martichou/mdns-sd"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "unsolicited"

[source."https://github.com/joeleaver/nearby-rs"]
git = "https://github.com/joeleaver/nearby-rs"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "master"

[source."https://github.com/joeleaver/rinch"]
git = "https://github.com/joeleaver/rinch"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "main"

[source."https://github.com/joeleaver/rquickshare"]
git = "https://github.com/joeleaver/rquickshare"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "beamish"

[source."https://github.com/rust-windowing/softbuffer"]
git = "https://github.com/rust-windowing/softbuffer"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
rev = "672d180"

[source."https://github.com/martichou/sys_metrics"]
git = "https://github.com/martichou/sys_metrics"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
